# coder-SIN-Qwen - Full Context

> Standalone relay proxy that sends project context to Qwen via browser UI automation and returns the answer. No API key needed.

## What It Does
- Collects local project context (files, git state, dependencies)
- Sends context to Qwen via automated Chrome browser UI
- Returns Qwen's answer as plain text or structured JSON
- Supports multi-turn conversations, conversation trees, account rotation
- Enterprise-grade: self-healing, state machine, secret management, observability

## Quick Start
```bash
git clone https://github.com/OpenSIN-Browser-Use-Agents/coder-SIN-Qwen.git
cd coder-SIN-Qwen
pnpm install
node ./index.js "Review this repo"
```

## Architecture
- CLI Entrypoint: index.js
- Core Library: packages/qwen-core/ (21+ modules)
- Browser: Playwright + Chrome CDP sidecar attach
- Auth: Direct email/password login with account rotation
- Secrets: Zero-trust SecretClient (Infisical + env fallback)
- State: 9-state BrowserStateMachine with event-driven sync
- Self-Healing: 6 recovery playbooks for known error scenarios
- Storage: Local JSON file for conversation trees + consult memory
- CI/CD: pnpm + Turborepo with concurrency grouping

## Key Modules (packages/qwen-core/)
- context.js - Context collection and URL accessibility checks
- prompt-builder.js - Structured prompt construction
- browser-hardening.js - Safe prompt injection and DOM interaction
- validator.js - Response validation and fluff stripping
- lifecycle.js - Resource tracking and cleanup
- trace.js - Run/trace/span correlation
- conversation-tree.js - Persistent branching store
- secrets-check.js - Secret presence validation
- lib/secret-client.js - Zero-trust secret management
- lib/selector-chain.js - Multi-strategy DOM selector resolution
- lib/browser-state-machine.js - 9-state browser FSM
- lib/self-heal.js - Recovery playbook orchestrator
- lib/dom-hash.js - DOM drift detection
- lib/recovery-playbook.js - 6 playbooks for error scenarios
- lib/context-compressor.js - Token budget + relevance scoring
- lib/token-budget.js - Per-category budget allocation
- lib/relevance-scorer.js - TF-IDF cosine similarity
- lib/structured-log.js - Canonical log entry schema
- lib/dom-snapshot.js - HTML snapshot with rotation
- lib/async-event-loop.js - Task queue with timeout
- lib/ephemeral-profile.js - Temp Chrome profile management
- lib/attachment-hardening.js - File size/MIME validation
- lib/prompt-guard.js - Prompt length enforcement
- lib/wait-for-completion.js - Completion stability detection
- lib/cdp-probe.js - CDP endpoint health check
- lib/memory-writer.js - Atomic JSON file writes
- lib/git-prepare.js - Commit preparation

## Test Suite
- 200+ tests across 20+ test files
- Property-based tests (fast-check): invariants for all core modules
- Integration tests: module interaction verification
- Unit tests: individual function coverage
- Coverage available via: pnpm run coverage
